messages.subject: [R-sig-Epi] Epi 1.0.12 is on CRAN
messages.body_plain:
The latest update of Epi, 1.0.12, is now avaialble at CRAN.

A few extra features for the APC-function have been added, and some incompatibilities
with the new syntax for survfit have been fixed.

The Vignette explaining the Lexis functions for representation and manipulation of survival data
have been updated.

Regards,
Bendix Carstensen,
package maintainer.
_______________________________________________

Bendix Carstensen 
Senior Statistician
